description_long: This object is a compact, tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a modern, angular design. The main body features a vented handguard with multiple slots, likely for heat dissipation and accessory mounting. The barrel is short and cylindrical, protruding slightly from the front, and the receiver is boxy with a robust, utilitarian appearance. The grip is a pronounced pistol grip, ergonomically shaped for secure handling, and there is no visible traditional stock, making the weapon more maneuverable in tight urban environments. The trigger area is integrated into the lower receiver, and the overall construction suggests a focus on durability and ease of use. The surface appears to be made primarily of metal with some polymer components, giving it a rugged, professional look.
description: A compact, matte black tactical shotgun with a vented handguard, short barrel, and ergonomic pistol grip. Its modern, angular design is built for durability and maneuverability.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the vented handguard, short barrel, and pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the symmetrical, angular handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the handguard slots and grip.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver and the top of the pistol grip, with no traditional stock visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting on the barrel itself
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard integrated into the lower receiver with no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
